changes.value:
## What
Update the validator prompt rendering to inform the LLM that it has `code_context` and `validator_files` tools available. Without this, the validator agent won't know it can read files or search code.

**Files:**
- `avp-common/src/validator/executor.rs` — `RuleSetSessionContext`, `RulePromptContext`
- `.system/validator` prompt template (or wherever the validator system prompt lives)

**Approach:**
Add a section to the validator session init prompt that describes the available tools:
- `validator_files` — read file contents, glob for file patterns
- `code_context` — search symbols, grep code, get blast radius, call graphs

Include brief usage examples so the LLM knows the tool schemas.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Validator session init prompt mentions both tools with usage examples
- [ ] Prompt is only added when MCP tools are available (not when running without MCP)
- [ ] Existing validator behavior unchanged when tools are not configured

## Tests
- [ ] Unit test: rendered prompt includes tool descriptions when MCP is configured
- [ ] Unit test: rendered prompt omits tool descriptions when MCP is not configured
- [ ] `cargo test -p avp-common`
Update validator prompt templates to mention available tools
